channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Adobe Summit 2026: we're live at Adobe's annual keynotes to hear what's new this year
item.description: Our live coverage from Adobe Summit 2026, where we expect to hear about some new agentic capabilities and see products in action at live demos.

item.title: L’iPhone 18 Pro progresserait drastiquement en photo : pourquoi nous sommes confiants
item.description: L'iPhone 18 Pro serait bel et bien équipé d'un nouveau capteur principal à ouverture variable lui permettant de progresser sensiblement en photo. On apprend cette semaine que ce composant majeur entrerait petit bout par petit bout en phase de production pour équiper, à temps, le futur modèle haut de gamme d'Apple.

item.title: Rivian’s factory hit by tornado ahead of R2 launch
item.description: Nobody was hurt after an EF-1 tornado hit the part of the factory where the R2 SUV is supposed to be built.

item.title: Apple says it’s survived a ‘relentless legal campaign’ against the Apple Watch — and it could mean a key health feature is returning to your wrist
item.description: A legal ruling means blood oxygen measurements could return to the Apple Watch after a lengthy absence.

item.title: Même pas sortie, la Steam Machine a déjà une concurrente et son prix est salé
item.description: Le constructeur Playnix lance un concurrent pour la Steam Machine.

item.title: The AI trust advantage: How smarter security wins customer confidence
item.description: CX platforms have more data access due to AI - security teams must reconsider governance.

item.title: Comment transférer ses playlists Spotify vers Apple Music ?
item.description: Hop ! Vous avez décidé de changer de service de streaming musical en passant de Spotify à Apple Music. Mais transférer ses playlists ne se fait pas en un claquement de doigts. Heureusement, il y a des méthodes pour ne pas recommencer à composer ses playlists de 1 000 titres.

item.title: The Elden Ring movie hits theaters in March 2028
item.description: It's going to be a little while before The Lands Between is realized in movie form. Bandai Namco just confirmed that the live-action Elden Ring movie, which was announced last year, is expected to hit theaters on March 3rd, 2028, with production kicking off this spring. Based on FromSoftware's open-world fantasy RPG from 2022, Elden […]

item.title: Google s’associe à une marque de luxe pour lancer des lunettes connectées haut de gamme
item.description: Google s'associe à Gucci pour lancer des lunettes connectées haut de gamme intégrant l'IA

item.title: I went inside Mattel and saw how Toy Story 5 toys are built — and made interactive
item.description: Behind the scenes at Mattel and the making of Toy Story 5 toys.

item.title: Le Samsung Odyssey G5 chute à 349 € : du QD-OLED 180 Hz à prix cassé
item.description: Samsung confirme une nouvelle fois son savoir-faire sur les écrans OLED avec un moniteur pensé pour les joueurs exigeants. Le modèle Odyssey G5 réunit en effet tout ce que l’on attend d’une référence gaming et son prix chute à 349 euros.

item.title: Je suis monté à bord de la nouvelle Mercedes Classe C électrique : 760 km d’autonomie et une recharge ultra rapide pour faire taire la concurrence, c’est suffisant ?
item.description: La Mercedes Classe C passe à l'électrique. Avec une nouvelle architecture dédiée, un habitacle repensé et des ambitions techniques élevées, la berline allemande tente de s'imposer dans un segment de plus en plus disputé. Sur le papier, les arguments sont nombreux. Mais est-ce suffisant pour convaincre ? On l’a découverte en statique et voici ce qu’on en pense. ...

item.title: Le robot Honor pulvérise le record du monde humain du semi-marathon
item.description: Le robot humanoïde Lightning de Honor a fait ses preuves lors des 21 km de course parcourus à Beijing aux côtés d'autres machines bipèdes.

item.title: Refunds can now be claimed by businesses impacted by Trump’s unconstitutional tariffs
item.description: U.S. Customs and Border Protection says importers can begin the refund process through an online portal. A refund system for businesses that paid tariffs which the U.S. Supreme Court ruled President Donald Trump imposed without the constitutional authority to do so is scheduled to launch Monday.Importers and their brokers will be able to begin claiming refunds through an online portal beginning at 8 a.m., according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection, the agency administering the system.It’s the first step in a complicated process that also might eventually lead to refunds for consumers who ...

item.title: GoPro’s Mission 1 camera series will start at $600
item.description: We heard all about GoPro's new action camera series last week, but the company is now unveiling the pricing across its Mission 1, Mission 1 Pro and Mission 1 Pro ILS cameras. The entry-level Mission 1 ($600) features GoPro's new 50-megapixel 1-inch sensor, which the company says will offer a major leap in image quality and low-light performance over the Hero 13 line. While largely looking the same as the Hero series (and still waterproof), the Mission 1 can record 8K video at 30fps and 4K at 120fps. It lacks the higher frame rates of the other Mission 1 cameras, but supports 10-bit GP-Log2 col...

item.title: Prego Has a Dinner-Conversation-Recording Device, Capisce?
item.description: The pasta-sauce company has partnered with the nonprofit StoryCorps on a device designed to record family conversations around the table and save them for all time.

item.title: Vampire Survivors’ new spinoff switches genres but keeps the good vibes
item.description: When Vampire Survivors first exploded onto the scene, it was pretty much all I could think about. The formula of jumping into runs, taking on thousands of enemies, and becoming absurdly overpowered kept me picking up the game again and again - Steam says I've played it for more than 60 hours. Over time, though, […]

item.title: This pasta sauce wants to record your family
item.description: As if there weren't already enough devices listening in on everything being said in your home, Prego, the pasta and pizza sauce brand, is releasing a device designed to record everything said around the dinner table for posterity. The Connection Keeper, which looks like an oversized pasta jar lid, was created in collaboration with StoryCorps, […]

item.title: Has the smartphone hijacked your dinner table? StoryCorps and Prego made this gadget to rescue your dinner convos
item.description: StoryCorps and Prego partnered on a limited-run Connection Keeper to help you record family dinners and leave those phones behind.

item.title: ‘Spicy pillows’ are the new hidden battery danger I found in my home — here’s how to dispose of them safely
item.description: I recently discovered a 'spicy pillow' in my home — here's everything you need to know about disposing of them.

item.title: I went behind the scenes at Mattel — and its new Woody and Buzz feel like they stepped out of Toy Story
item.description: Ultimate Action Woody and Buzz each boast 70+ phrases and have two modes — Alive or Toy —, with lots of tech under the hood.

item.title: What is the release date for Daredevil: Born Again season 2 episode 6 on Disney+?
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again season 2 is about to turn onto the home straight — here's when its sixth episode will be released.

item.title: 2 new Chase Sapphire airport lounges are coming. Here’s what to expect and when
item.description: Set to open in Dallas-Fort Worth and Los Angeles, the lounges reflect Chase’s push to turn airports into experiences. For years, premium credit cards competed on points, perks, and airport lounge access. Now the lounge itself is becoming the strategy.

item.title: Gap is dropping a Victoria Beckham collab, bringing her discerning eye to denim
item.description: Gap continues its cultural comeback with a refined collection from the British celeb. I’m not one for binaries, but it’s likely you’re either aware of Gap’s 2025 comeback tour, or you have a healthy amount of screen time. For those of us who aren’t full luddite teen (aspirational), I’m here to tell you that Gap is continuing its play to cement its place among the fashion set—and cultural domination—in 2026....

item.title: How to watch NBA live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch NBA for free. Live stream NBA games for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Some of the best running headphones just dropped back to a record-low price — an ideal buy for marathon season
item.description: Amazon slashes the price of the Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 down to a record-low price of £135.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for April 20, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: U.S. attacks and seizes Iranian ship in Strait of Hormuz, throwing a ceasefire into question
item.description: It was the first interception since the U.S. Navy’s blockade began last week. The United States attacked and seized an Iranian-flagged cargo ship it said had tried to evade its naval blockade near the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday, and Iran’s joint military command vowed to respond, throwing a fragile ceasefire into question days before it expires.It was the first interception since the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports began last week. Iran’s joint military command called the armed boarding an act of piracy and a ceasefire violation, the state broadcaster said.With the U.S.-Iran standoff over the s...

item.title: Tinder, Zoom, Docusign : le projet de scan d’Iris du patron d’OpenAI s’arrête aux frontières de l’Europe
item.description: Le patron d'OpenAI vend désormais la solution au problème que ses propres IA fabriquent. Tinder, Zoom et Docusign ont signé.

item.title: Watch out, hackers are abusing Apple account notifications to distribute malware, steal money and data
item.description: Researchers found a new callback phishing campaign abusing Apple's email notification system.

item.title: Amazon casse le prix du Dyson V10 Submarine, un aspirateur laveur 2-en-1 efficace
item.description: Dyson est connue pour ses aspirateurs balais sans fil haut de gamme, et certains vont encore plus loin en intégrant une fonction de lavage des sols. C'est le cas du Cyclone V10 Submarine, un modèle 2-en-1 dont le prix chute à 440 euros, contre 549 euros de base.

item.title: $99 Apple AirPods 4 are back at Amazon — save $30 right now
item.description: As of April 20, the AirPods 4 (without ANC) have dropped to $99 at Amazon, 23% off their list price of $129.

item.title: Netflix : comment accéder à 36 000 catégories cachées avec des codes secrets ? Nos astuces
item.description: Vous avez l'impression de voir toujours les mêmes recommandations tourner en boucle sur votre compte Netflix ? C'est normal : l'algorithme ne vous montre qu'une infime partie du catalogue. Derrière votre page d'accueil se cachent plus de 36 000 catégories accessibles via des codes secrets. Voici comment les utiliser sur Netflix.

item.title: Galaxy S27 Ultra : Samsung pourrait enfin revoir sa copie avec une nouvelle batterie
item.description: Après des années de prudence face à ses concurrents chinois, Samsung semble enfin prêt à rattraper son retard dans le domaine des batteries. Selon de récentes indiscrétions, la future gamme Galaxy S27 devrait embarquer une batterie inédite au silicium-carbone, promettant une autonomie et une longévité améliorées.

item.title: Nostalgique du Blackberry ? Ce smartphone hybride pourrait vous faire craquer
item.description: Le Titan 2 Elite est un smartphone Android compact équipé d’un clavier physique. Si son design rappelle le célèbre BlackBerry, Unihertz ne fait pas l’impasse sur les technologies modernes.

item.title: Huawei beats Samsung and Apple to market with the first wide foldable
item.description: Huawei has launched its passport-style foldable in China, ahead of similar devices said to be coming from Apple and Samsung. That makes the Pura X Max the first wide foldable phone that's actually available to buy, with today's launch now giving us the full specifications and price after its design was unveiled by Huawei last […]

item.title: What’s going on with AST SpaceMobile? Blue Origin mishap sends ASTS stock tumbling
item.description: After Jeff Bezos’s space company launched its flagship rocket, the New Glenn, on Sunday, something went wrong, sparking a selloff in ASTS shares. Shares in the space-based internet provider AST SpaceMobile Inc (Nasdaq: ASTS) are sinking this morning after a major mishap occurred with the deployment of its latest satellite from Blue Origin’s most advanced rocket, the New Glenn. Here’s what you need to know....

item.title: Windows 11 : le Patch Tuesday d’avril n’échappe pas aux bugs
item.description: La dernière mise à jour mensuelle de Windows 11 pose de sérieux problèmes à certains utilisateurs, bloqués dans une interminable « boucle de la mort ».

item.title: Installations solaires et cyberattaques : les bonnes pratiques pour sécuriser ses équipements
item.description: Les installations solaires reposent de plus en plus sur des systèmes intelligents et connectés. Mais leur dépendance au numérique devient aussi un point de fragilité en les exposant à des risques croissant de cyberattaques.

item.title: Humanoid robot beats human world record for the first time at the Beijing half marathon — but some are still stumbling at the starting line
item.description: Take a look at the robots running in the second Humanoid Robot Half Marathon in Beijing, China.

item.title: DJI lance une station électrique portable qui recharge un drone en 30 minutes
item.description: DJI lance la Power 1000 Mini, une station électrique de 1 kWh deux fois plus compacte que son modèle précédent. Pensée pour les créateurs de contenu et les vanlifers, elle promet une recharge rapide, une intégration native à l'écosystème DJI et une robustesse tout terrain : le tout à 579 €.

item.title: DJI’s latest power station is proof that good things come in mini packages
item.description: As an avid vanlifer, I have to carefully curate everything I carry in order to eke out every square inch of storage I can to support life off the grid for weeks at a time. That's why I jumped at the chance to review DJI's latest power station. The DJI Power 1000 Mini is almost […]

item.title: A different kind of “trust” fund
item.description: On World Creativity and Innovation Day, there’s a case for the most underrated climate tool. When people discuss climate innovation, they often picture technology. Better batteries. Smarter grids. Carbon capture at scale. Those breakthroughs matter and are happening every day. But on this World Creativity and Innovation Day, I want to make a case for a different kind of innovation. One that is structural rather than technical, already underway, and quietly accelerating climate progress....

item.title: France Titres (ANTS) admet avoir été piraté : le butin des malfaiteurs est très juteux
item.description: La plateforme France Titres, en charge des documents liés à l'état civil et nos entreprises, a été piratée.

item.title: Marvel at Earthset video from Artemis II, shot on iPhone
item.description: Commander Reid Wiseman shared an extraordinary video he shot on an iPhone 17 Pro Max from inside NASA's Orion spacecraft during the mission, and it's a stunner.

item.title: Blue Origin hits major milestone with latest space mission — and then utterly failed to achieve its main objective
item.description: Blue Origin reused a rocket booster for the first time on a mission, but then failed to complete its objective.
